dialogueLines.text: Hey Echo, did you give a flower to Darry?
Wow Echo you're shining brighter today than ever.
Honestly Echo, I'm getting mixed signals about you right now..
Oh! Echo I forgot to give this to you before I go. I found this in front of your doora

Echo, I still can’t believe Penelope is gone. I had warned her about the danger that was going around the neighborhood. I told her it wasn’t safe but I didn’t stay with her when she needed me. I let her go by herself and that was the last I saw of her..

choices.text: You can't blame yourself for what happened.

dialogueLines.text: I know I shouldn’t but the guilt eats at me everyday. Things would be different if I convinced her a little harder or went with her instead. I know what’s done can’t be reversed but I feel haunted by my choices.
That’s the same question I ask myself everyday… I definitelyyyyyy appreciate you bringing it up… Why didn’t you go, Echo? Why weren’t you there?
Sorry I am just really upset at myself.  I would do anything to change what happened...

Oh! I have to get home soon, I spent too much time out today.  I wantd to help adjust some of the graves that are tilting out of place, I'd appreciate it if you did it for me.  Also Stevey said he had to give you something vefore you left tonight, so go see him after.
Thank you, Echo! I'll see you tomorrow.
